title: season — authorization policies
description: One policy — SeasonPolicy — narrows by scope suffix (`.any` / `.tenant`). Every tenant member can READ seasons in their active tenant (they are base UI reference data every enrollment + team dropdown needs). Only admins + owners can WRITE. The `is_current` flag has extra guardrails: `seasons.set_current` is owner-only because current-season changes shift year-over-year reporting frames.

abilities.scope: resolved via ScopeSuffixResolver — `.tenant` narrows to the caller's active tenant; `.any` unrestricted (platform_admin only). Every tenant role gets `.tenant` by default because seasons are UI reference data.
single-row check by suffix. `.tenant` requires the Season's tenant_id to match the caller's active tenant.
admin or owner in the active tenant. Also gated by the `sports_seasons` entitlement + the `season_slot` per-year cap — the observer refuses with SEASON_QUOTA_EXCEEDED when the slot is exhausted.

admin or owner. Mutable fields listed in routes.json PATCH endpoint. Immutable-after-create: tenant_id, organization_id, branch_id. sport_key mutable only pre-in_progress. start_date/end_date mutable in-progress with `seasons.dates.shift`.

owner only. Permits start_date / end_date / playoff timestamp changes on Seasons with status IN (in_progress, playoffs). Never permitted on completed seasons (would corrupt financial-period attribution).
owner only. Refused when is_current=true or active enrollments reference. Soft-delete only — hard-delete via PurgeArchivedSeasonsJob after retention window.
owner only. Changing the current season affects year-over-year reporting queries.
admin or owner. Refused when now() < registration_opens_at unless caller holds seasons.registration.open-early (owner-only).
owner only. Bypasses the scheduled-open guardrail.
admin or owner. Refused when now() < start_date unless caller holds seasons.start.early (owner-only).
admin or owner. Refused when has_playoffs=false OR now() < playoff_starts_at unless caller holds seasons.playoffs.begin-early (owner-only).
admin or owner. Manual completion from in_progress or playoffs.
admin or owner. Refused when is_current=true (`CANNOT_ARCHIVE_CURRENT_SEASON`) OR when active downstream enrollments reference (`SEASON_HAS_ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS`).
admin or owner. Only within the retention window.
platform_admin only. Cross-tenant read for support tooling.
